reviews.comment:
Paso varias veces al año por Sarmiento y siempre paro en ésta estación.  Buena atención de los playeros, tenes agua para mate, podes comer algo. Destaco la limpieza de los baños, siempre hay papel higiénico, toallas de papel, jabón...impecable a la hora que vayas, para felicitarlos!!!

(Translated by Google)
I pass through Sarmiento several times a year and always stop at this station. The attendants are very helpful; they have hot water for mate and you can get something to eat. I especially want to highlight the cleanliness of the restrooms; there's always toilet paper, paper towels, soap... spotless no matter what time you go. They deserve a big compliment!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4406352797559943045/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQtdGRQSThBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Para los chilenos no es bueno pasar a cargar combustible, ya que te sobrecargan el precio con unos impuestos de locos y el valor final es mucho mas caro que en Chile. Al final pase al otro servicentro que está a 500 metros de distancia donde no aplican la sobretasa en el precio.no lo recomiendo para los chilenos.

(Translated by Google)
For Chileans, it's not a good idea to stop for fuel there, as they add crazy taxes to the price, making it much more expensive than in Chile. I ended up going to another service station 500 meters away where they don't apply the surcharge. I don't recommend it for Chileans.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4406352797559943045/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMtblAyTThnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Siempre cargo en esta estación,  nunca tuve problemas de conseguir el combustible que consumo. Aun que en otras estaciones si , la ultra o diesel 500 tienen sus cupos .
Los muchachos que despachan muy amables  .💪

(Translated by Google)
I always fill up at this station; I've never had trouble getting the fuel I need. Although at other stations, they do have their quotas for Ultra or Diesel 500.
The guys who work there are very friendly. 💪
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4406352797559943045/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMta016Z0ZnEAE

reviews.comment:
El full no es full no venden hamburguesas hasta las 11:30 de la mañana y cierran a las 21hs

(Translated by Google)
The place isn't full; they don't sell hamburgers until 11:30 in the morning and they close at 9 pm.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4406352797559943045/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMtb05yX1lnEAE

reviews.comment:
Excelente atención tanto en la estación de servicio en si como en el YPF Full. Baños impecables, con  todo funcionando.
Destacó también la excelente atención de las chicas que atienden.
Viajo mucho por Argentina y les aseguro que es la mejor estación YPF de todas las que visité ( que además siempre son muy buenas)

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service both at the gas station itself and at the YPF Full. Spotless restrooms, everything in working order.
I also want to highlight the excellent service from the attendants. I travel a lot in Argentina and I can assure you that this is the best YPF station of all the ones I've visited (and they're always very good).
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4406352797559943045/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURlMzViTktBEAE
